channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Excessive rubbish in bike hanger, 9th May
item.description:
The rubbish is piling up inside the bike hanger and it’s unclear if it’s purposely being swept in there or if it’s due to wind. It is unpleasant to put bikes in and out, and some of the litter includes used pads and nappies which is unhygienic

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Telecommunications Cover, 9th May
item.description:
The concrete communications cover has been driven over by a large vehicle. Half of it has been completely destroyed and replaced by three wooden planks. The remaining half is badly cracked and rocking. It is very dangerous and needs to be fixed urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brunswick Villas, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road marking has faded, 9th May
item.description:
Between P22 and P25 the road marking has faded and needs to be repainted. Pls see the image attached.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 9th May
item.description:
Dog poo on the pavement of Midhurst Hill, DA6.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Mattress & Chairs, 9th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped a mattress. Maybe the council might consider a free collection service as this is a regular occurrence and people do not want to pay.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cole Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving etc dumped by row of three garages Morpeth Road, 9th May
item.description:
As above thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutland Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fridge and washing machine, 9th May
item.description:
Dumped fridge and washing machine

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Walk, Woolwich

item.title: Flytipping opposite queens rd peckham station on asylum rd, 9th May
item.description:
Somebody has gotten into a pattern of flytipping at the top of asylum rd peckham. This us becoming a constant oroblem

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Asylum Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Requires removal

item.title: Rubbish not been picked up, 9th May
item.description:
This rubbish is been here for a week naw am complaining everyday,all I see is the rubbish getting bigger and bigger everyday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trade vehicle blocking driveway, 9th May
item.description:
We live at 115 Gordon Road and the trade vehicle keeps blocking our driveway for days at a time. This has been going on and off for weeks. There is paid parking on the other side of the road they refuse to use

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Gordon Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting on street light, 9th May
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are 2 similar indentations in pavement next to lamppost., 9th May
item.description:
Both need resurfacing or repairing. Either side of lamppost. One council has marked.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overbury Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54-82, Wivenhoe Close, Peckham, Greater London

item.description:

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 9th May
item.description:
Litter bin unemptied for several days, rubbish overflowing and strewn over pavement, including open food-smeared takeaway cartons.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Parade, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
